title: Chronicle S7b: deterministic historian-actions filer - the ONLY writer from historian to inbox (validated, clamped, namespaced)
summary: Close the loop from batch review to queued work WITHOUT an unvalidated LLM->inbox channel (failure mode 5): a deterministic post-step in cmd_loop parses historian-actions.json {preventive_actions:[{id,title,weight_hint,evidence}]} with STRICT validation and files items via the existing auto-injector idiom (cmd_loop_outcome.go:225 fileUnexplainedOutcomeDefect pattern). Hard rules enforced by the filer, not the prompt: id forced into the historian- namespace; weight clamped to [0.5, 0.95]; max 3 actions per batch; evidence field REQUIRED (reject actions without artifact pointers); NEVER overwrites an existing inbox item (os.Stat dedup); strict json decode of the actions envelope. Rejected actions are logged in the historian workspace, never filed silently.
notes: [SCOPE 2026-07-23] Implement against the landed S4 boundary applier (recurrence.ApplyBoundary) — no second filer; clamp/namespace rules carry over.
